title: Data Science & ML
description: End-to-end ML pipelines — from raw data ingestion and EDA to feature engineering, model training, evaluation, and production deployment. Experienced with Scikit-learn, TensorFlow, XGBoost, and time-series forecasting.

title: Full-Stack Development
description: Building scalable web applications with React/Next.js on the frontend and FastAPI or Node.js on the backend. RESTful & GraphQL APIs, JWT authentication, PostgreSQL/MongoDB databases, and responsive mobile-first UIs.

title: Generative AI
description: Designing and shipping production LLM systems — RAG pipelines, custom fine-tuning, LangChain agents, prompt engineering, and multi-modal AI integrations using OpenAI, Anthropic, and open-source models.

title: Production & Cloud
description: Containerizing applications with Docker, setting up CI/CD pipelines with GitHub Actions, and deploying to Vercel, AWS, and cloud platforms. Infrastructure-as-code mindset with a focus on reliability and zero-downtime deploys.
